case_title: BERNARD FRAENKEL VS. CLOUDTALK INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRAENKEL, BERNARD AS TO DEFENDANT CLOUDTALK INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA CLOUDTALK JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRAENKEL, BERNARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLOUDTALK INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA CLOUDTALK $185,895.93 PRINCIPAL, $902.94 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $187,208.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
